title: Web dashboard for DEF CON Confessions and Find My Hacker (out of scope)
description: Frontend web apps for the demo epic are out of scope per instructions. File as human bead. Requires browser-based Leaflet/Mapbox, WebSocket bridge, D3 visualization. Human to decide implementation path or defer.
